Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to feed into email content generation.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and active deals, keeping messaging accurate and conversion-ready without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a compelling, on-brand daily marketing email using scraped product and promotional data from the R1 website.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, personalized email copy at scale daily, eliminating hours of manual copywriting and maintaining consistent brand voice.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email content and distributes it to segmented R1 Concepts contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily audience delivery to the full contact base, driving consistent engagement and repeat purchases without manual campaign setup.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product lines, featured parts, and active promotions to inform email content.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email tailored to DFC's brand voice using the scraped website content.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated DFC email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily outreach to DFC's customer base, maintaining top-of-mind awareness and driving consistent revenue touchpoints.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, order details, and ticket metadata.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes incoming support requests for automated processing, ensuring no ticket is missed and response time is dramatically reduced.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a contextual, brand-appropriate reply for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket triage and response drafting time significantly, allowing support agents to handle higher volume with greater consistency.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the AI-generated classification and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket for the support team to review and action.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all support context inside HubSpot, enabling agents to approve and send responses in one click rather than composing from scratch.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue intake form stored in HubSpot.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Consolidates customer issue data from a distributed physical flyer process into a single digital pipeline, eliminating manual data collection.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review and trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives product, ops, and support teams a live, shareable view of return patterns and recurring issues to drive quality improvements.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity for DFC customers who are actively browsing or engaging with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces real-time buying intent signals from existing DFC customers, creating timely opportunities for the sales team to re-engage.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an instant alert to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams message and email with the customer activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables sales reps to reach out within minutes of a customer showing intent, significantly improving response rates and deal conversion.

R1 Customer Agent.action: This agent is currently in development and connections have not yet been finalized.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to automate customer-facing interactions for R1 Concepts, improving response times and customer satisfaction at scale.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates email addresses for decision-makers at the identified target businesses.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Creates a fully automated daily outreach loop that consistently fills the lead funnel for the sublet without any manual effort.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS metrics.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget shifts, and keyword opportunities.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers data-driven ad optimization insights continuously, improving ROAS and reducing wasted spend without requiring a dedicated ads analyst.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching the input keywords, retrieving channel data, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Rapidly surfaces relevant creator candidates from YouTube's vast library, compressing days of manual creator research into seconds.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Retrieves Instagram profile data for matched creators including follower counts, post frequency, and engagement metrics.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator discovery across Instagram simultaneously, giving a fuller cross-platform picture of each creator's reach and activity.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and summarizes discovered creator profiles across platforms to produce a ranked, enriched shortlist based on relevance to the input keywords.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Eliminates manual review of hundreds of raw profiles by delivering a curated, AI-scored list ready for outreach or qualification.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, audience fit, niche alignment, and follower quality.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces an objective, consistent creator ranking that removes guesswork from influencer selection and prioritizes the highest-value partnerships.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the qualified creator list and outreach sequence templates stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Centralizes creator data and messaging playbooks so the agent always works from the latest approved materials without manual file sharing.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each creator by applying learned sequences and brand-specific prompts to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-quality outreach at scale, replacing hours of manual copywriting and increasing creator response rates.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the brand inbox.
Creator Outreach.impact: Delivers consistent, on-brand outreach to hundreds of creators simultaneously, compressing a multi-day manual task into minutes.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email threads and negotiation outcomes to provide context for learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds the AI in real negotiation history so responses reflect proven tactics and brand-approved deal terms rather than generic replies.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation responses using learned conversation patterns from past influencer contacts.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps negotiations moving without human intervention on routine exchanges, shortening deal cycles and freeing the partnership team for high-value decisions.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or drafts the AI-crafted negotiation reply back to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures creators receive timely, professional follow-ups that maintain momentum and reduce drop-off during the partnership negotiation process.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Pulls the MHM vehicle data and New Availability Guide, then matches part numbers to build the formatted load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual cross-referencing between two large data sources, reducing load sheet prep from hours to seconds with no lookup errors.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Analyzes new product launch data and generates compelling sales sheet copy and monthly recap email content tailored to DFC's First to Market positioning.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces launch-ready marketing copy in seconds, enabling the team to communicate new product availability to customers faster than competitors.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates email drafts in HubSpot using the AI-generated content, attaching the sales sheet and scheduling the monthly recap email.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and email performance data for the reporting period.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts SMS campaign performance metrics including sends, click rates, and revenue attributed to text campaigns.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Captures SMS channel results in the same automated pull, giving leadership a complete cross-channel view without manual data entry.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves web traffic, conversion events, and channel attribution data for the reporting month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls organic search impressions, clicks, and top-performing queries for the period.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck, populating charts, tables, and text placeholders.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully updated 8-slide section in seconds, saving several hours of monthly deck preparation and eliminating transcription errors.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts has low visibility compared to competitors by analyzing query performance data.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including focus keyword, meta title, and readability settings.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open vendor purchase order data including overdue dates, vendor contacts, and outstanding quantities.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts uploaded MHM vehicle data and New Availability Guide files, matches part numbers between them in the browser, and generates a formatted DFC load sheet.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens the Attentive dashboard via Chrome automation, locates the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clones it as the new week's campaign.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, last order dates, and product categories.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back audiences based on sales data, then enrolls each segment in targeted email sequences.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS messages to high-value reorder and win-back segments identified from the Dream sales analysis.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized B2B blog content targeting DFC's core audiences including shops, distributors, and fleet operators using keyword and topic inputs.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog post and publishes it with proper formatting, SEO metadata, and category tagging on the DFC website.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday video formats, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images via Puppeteer, and retrieves vehicle history and specs from Wikipedia and Wikimedia Commons.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and asset hunting by automatically sourcing all raw content, images, and reference material needed to build a production-ready video package.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a fully rendered voiceover audio file using a consistent AI voice.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword ranking positions, impressions, clicks, and CTR data for all DFC blog URLs to measure SEO performance.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives inbound customer support messages and passes raw ticket content into the automation pipeline for processing.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and triggers the downstream upload and campaign creation workflow.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors task activity across Asana projects and surfaces updates, overdue items, or status changes for processing.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Ensures the catalog output reflects real-time inventory truth rather than static catalog data, preventing quotes based on unavailable stock.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures the combined catalog and inventory data into a clean, formatted Excel file layout, labeling what DFC stocks, quantities available, and what is missing from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Eliminates manual spreadsheet formatting work and ensures every catalog output is consistently structured and easy for Mark to use immediately.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the completed Excel catalog file directly to Mark as an attachment with a summary of stocked versus missing parts.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a finished, actionable catalog to Mark's inbox automatically, removing the back-and-forth of manual fulfillment requests.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status — on hand, on order, and in transit — for every part number on the current weekly backorder report.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, recovering hours of redundant labor every week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each backorder line with the live Dream inventory data and flags any parts with no on-hand, no on-order, and no in-transit status as dead-end with no source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team an instantly actionable report that separates resolvable backorders from true dead-ends, so effort is focused where it can actually move orders forward.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backorder updates, including realistic ETAs for sourceable parts and escalation notes for dead-end parts.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enables proactive customer communication at scale without requiring staff to individually draft each message, improving customer experience while reducing team workload.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo online catalogs to collect all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment database automatically, replacing what would otherwise be days of manual catalog cross-referencing.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify coverage gaps and overlap.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC has product and where opportunity exists, giving Dino a prioritized gap analysis without manual comparison work.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to target customers asking about demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from the market automatically, so product decisions are backed by customer data rather than assumptions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitments, DFC cross-reference results, and customer response data into one formatted output sheet for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, organized reference document that gives Dino everything needed to make informed two-piece rotor catalog expansion decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy including headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs across every live campaign.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly surfaces the full ad copy inventory across platforms without requiring anyone to manually open and read each ad in the ad manager.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field for the specified target phrases and flags each exact match with the campaign name, ad name, field type, and the verbatim copy where the match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across hundreds of ads in seconds, eliminating the risk of human review missing a match and removing hours of manual scanning.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged-copy report listing every match with the exact ad, field, and copy snippet for each identified phrase.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a complete, audit-ready findings list directly to the requester so action can be taken immediately on any non-compliant or problematic copy.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors jobs@r1concepts.com for incoming applications, parses each email for candidate name, role applied, and attached resume file.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures no application is missed or left unprocessed, replacing a manual inbox triage process that can delay responses by days.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to the appropriate organized folder in Drive, labeled by candidate name and role.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable resume archive automatically so the hiring team can always find any candidate file without digging through email attachments.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the open role it was submitted for, producing a hire/deny/pause decision with supporting rationale.
Resume Bot.impact: Cuts resume screening time dramatically by delivering a reasoned, consistent first-pass evaluation for every applicant so recruiters focus only on top candidates.

Resume Bot.action: Sends auto-reply emails to denied, no-resume, and paused-role candidates with appropriate messaging, and logs every decision with candidate details into a Sheets dashboard with a dedicated Pending tab for paused applicants.
Resume Bot.impact: Keeps every candidate informed without manual follow-up effort, while giving the hiring team a live decision log that eliminates the need to track applicant status in email threads.

summary: The automation pipeline is firing on all cylinders with 56 total agents across the board — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned for future development. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no existing agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the updates front, the existing fleet of live agents continues to run daily, weekly, and monthly workflows across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, SEO, customer support, and more. Great momentum heading into the weeks ahead as we work toward moving those in-progress and planned agents across the finish line!
